config.qoh.CanHorsesSwim.description: If enabled, horses can swim in water instead of sinking. (Note, you will not get kicked off of the horse when its underwater)
config.qoh.CanHorsesSwim.name: Can horses swim?
config.qoh.HorseFollowSpeedMult.descript: How much faster the horse will move when following the player. Setting this to 1 changes nothing.
config.qoh.HorseFollowSpeedMult.name: Follow speed multiplier
config.qoh.HorseFollowsOwner.description: If enabled, horses will automatically follow their owner whenever possible. (This will allow horses to teleport)
config.qoh.HorseFollowsOwner.name: Enabled (Horse follows owner)
config.qoh.HorseStartsFollowingAt.descri: How far away does the player need to be for the horse to start following them
config.qoh.HorseStartsFollowingAt.name: Start following at
config.qoh.HorseStopsFollowingAt.descrip: The distance a tamed horse will stop following you
config.qoh.HorseStopsFollowingAt.name: Stop following at
config.qoh.HorsesCanHaveChests.descripti: If enabled, right-clicking a horse with a chest will let you put a chest on it (like a donkey or mule), right-click with shears to remove the chest
config.qoh.HorsesCanHaveChests.name: Enabled (Horses have chests)
config.qoh.TeleportWhenFurtherAwayThan.d: If the horse is further away from the player than this distance, it will teleport to the player
config.qoh.TwoPlayerRideEnabled.descript: If enabled, two players can ride the same horse.
config.qoh.TwoPlayerRideEnabled.name: Can two (2) players ride on a horse?
config.qoh.inventoryColumns.description: Set the number of inventory columns the horse's chest will contain.
config.qoh.inventoryColumns.name: Inventory columns
lore.qoh.transfer_tip: To transfer ownership, right-click the horse as the owner, then right-click the new owner.
message.qoh.already_leashed: [QoH] This horse already has a leashed unleash it first!
message.qoh.error.binding: [QoH] Failed to bind to horse! Check logs for details.
message.qoh.error.not_bound: [QoH] This item is not bound to a horse!
message.qoh.error.not_found: [QoH] The horse bound to this item could not be found!
message.qoh.not_tamed_or_owner: [QoH] This horse is not tamed or you are not the owner!
painting.qoh.how_hungry.author: Unknown
painting.qoh.how_hungry.title: How Hungry
